_patch_meta.description: Follow-up to wa-cluster-M05-patch-vcrevise-utreview-v1-20260507.json. Resolves the one borderline verse held from the main UT review patch. Neh 13:14 / H2617A che.sed (vrID=3940, mti=536) confirmed relevant by researcher decision 2026-05-07. Rationale: the covenantal loyalty appeal activates the inner-disposition register of che.sed — Nehemiah presenting his faithfulness toward God's house as grounds for divine remembrance.
